query:
-- Match via services: Channel Haus service planName often contains the customer name
-- e.g. "pbx Coastal Dental Specialists" -> customer "Coastal Dental Specialists"
-- Use the friendly name from portal (stored in notes) to match against services.planName
UPDATE phone_numbers pn
JOIN services s ON (
  s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.customerName != 'NULL'
  AND s.customerName IS NOT NULL
  AND s.customerName != ''
  AND (
    LOWER(s.planName) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(pn.notes, ' ', 3), ' ', -1)), '%')
    OR LOWER(pn.notes) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(s.customerName, ' ', 2)), '%')
  )
)
SET
  pn.customerName = s.customerName,
  pn.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId,
  pn.serviceExternalId = s.externalId,
  pn.monthlyCost = s.monthlyCost,
  pn.monthlyRevenue = s.monthlyRevenue
WHERE pn.provider = 'Channel Haus'
  AND (pn.customerName = '' OR pn.customerName IS NULL);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

  pn.monthlyRevenue = s.monthlyRevenue
WHERE pn.provider = 'Channel Haus'
  AND (pn.customerName = '' OR pn.customerName IS NULL);
